title: Ophy All-in-One Dough Set: 48 Pcs Kitchen Creations Dough Tools Set with 12 Dough Blocks, Loaded with Modeling Clay Tools Set & Plasticine Accessories, Crafts Gift for Kids Ages 2+
features: 【Complete Kitchen Play Set】This all-in-one dough set includes a hamburger maker and pizza set. With 12 dough blocks and essential dough tools like a roller and cutters, it's the ultimate plasticine for kids to start creative role-play

【Massive Mold & Tool Collection】Get 36 claydough accessories including 12 hollow molds, 5 cutting sets, and 3 syringes. These dough tools provide endless variety, perfect for developing creativity with modelling clay for kids aged 2 and up

【12 Dough Blocks - Ready to Create】Dive right into creative fun! This complete clay dough kit includes 12 vibrant dough blocks—no need to buy separately. The collection features essential dough tools and dough accessories, making it the perfect plasticine modelling clay for kids. Young children develop motor skills and spark imagination through hands-on creative play
【Safe for Toddler Use】Every dough tool is non-toxic and sized for small hands. This dough set is rigorously tested, making it a safe and durable choice as plasticine for kids aged 2 and older

【Mess-Free Play, Easy Storage】 Say goodbye to playdough mess! Our complete dough set includes a silicone mat and storage bag that keep all dough accessories and dough tools perfectly organized. Enjoy hassle-free cleanup while your child explores creative fun with plasticine for kids - everything stores neatly away after playtime
